summary: Implement password reset flow via email
description:
## Overview
Users must be able to reset their password through a secure email-based flow.

## Acceptance Criteria
- User enters registered email on the forgot password screen
- System sends a reset link valid for 30 minutes
- Link can only be used once
- After reset, all active sessions are invalidated
- User receives confirmation email after successful reset

## Out of Scope
- SMS-based reset
- Security questions

## Technical Notes
- Token must be stored hashed in the database
- Rate limit: max 3 reset requests per hour per email
- Link format: /reset-password?token={uuid}
